Document
  └─ accordion
     ├─ accordion-item summary="Collapsed item" expanded=false
     │  └─ paragraph "This one starts closed."
     ├─ accordion-item summary="Expanded item" expanded=true
     │  └─ paragraph "This one starts open."
     └─ accordion-item summary="Another collapsed item" expanded=false
        └─ paragraph "Also closed by default."
